summary: Executed backend and frontend regression for password page relocation, forgot-password OTP WhatsApp flow, WhatsApp gateway settings/messages, submission review/revision status flow, and mobile usability.
action_items: Optional quality cleanup: address React hook dependency warnings in App.js useEffect blocks.
critical_code_review_comments: No blocking functional defects found in requested scope.
Frontend build succeeds with non-blocking react-hooks/exhaustive-deps warnings.
seed_data_creation: Created transient submissions/OTP records during integration tests; no mocked API used.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated on public URL with admin and student credentials from memory/test_credentials.md. Confirmed forgot-password creates WhatsApp queue entries (pending_config when provider disabled), reset-password-otp works via OTP fetched from MongoDB, dashboard does not show inline change-password form, header buttons open PasswordPage for admin/student, WhatsApp settings and queue/history page load correctly, grading page shows Dilihat/Revisi actions, and student can resubmit after revision request.
rca of the issue: No product defect identified in this iteration. Expected pending_config WhatsApp status is due to provider=disabled configuration (as specified).
